schedule.summary: Every two hours from 08:00 to 20:00 UTC

scorecardMetrics.description: How often targeted agentic workflows end in failure or repeated reruns.
How many open automation PRs and issues are waiting for human attention.
Whether planning branches are missing expected files, clearly stale, or structurally inconsistent.
Whether workflows are creating redundant, low-signal, or repetitive comments.
Whether tool access, network scope, and permissions are broader than the workflow needs.

goldenCases.description: Product validation should ask for clarification or mark out-of-scope instead of escalating every ambiguous issue into full planning.
Issue planning should keep one active specialist lane at a time and requeue only the role that is actually waiting.
Engineering Manager challenge comments should re-open only the named role lanes and should not duplicate earlier specialist commentary.
PR plan review should block cleanly when the PR is missing exactly one linked planning-ready issue.
Durable memory should keep recurring verified facts and remove stale, placeholder, or contradictory items.
When evidence is weak or the likely change is noisy, the agent should do nothing instead of producing speculative churn.
